title: onobrychis viciifolia var. decumbens
intro: Onobrychis viciifolia var. decumbens, also known as Persian clover or hairy trefoil, is a perennial legume native to Eurasia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can help to soothe digestive issues and support the immune system. The health benefits of Onobrychis viciifolia var. decumbens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support the treatment of various infections, such as urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
